query: ALTER TABLE user_profiles ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS targetWaterIntakeMl INT DEFAULT 2000 NOT NULL AFTER calorieTarget; ALTER TABLE user_profiles ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS targetSleepHours DECIMAL(3,1) DEFAULT 8.0 NOT NULL AFTER targetWaterIntakeMl;
